items.headline: Game 7 Drama Delivers: Cavaliers, Pistons, 76ers Advance to Conference Semifinals!
items.summary: Three thrilling Game 7 matchups concluded the First Round of the NBA Playoffs last night, with the Cleveland Cavaliers, Detroit Pistons, and Philadelphia 76ers all emerging victorious to punch their tickets to the Conference Semifinals.

items.headline: Trade Buzz Heats Up: Aaron Gordon, Anthony Davis Among Star Players in Rumor Mill
items.summary: As the postseason intensifies, the trade market is already buzzing with big names. Aaron Gordon of the Nuggets is reportedly drawing significant interest from the Lakers, Suns, and Celtics. Meanwhile, Anthony Davis's future with the Wizards remains uncertain, with speculation he may be on the move despite a hefty contract. Giannis Antetokounmpo's potential availability also looms large for the upcoming offseason.

items.headline: Cavaliers Top Raptors in Game 7 Thriller
items.summary: The Cleveland Cavaliers fought off the Toronto Raptors in a decisive Game 7, securing their spot in the Conference Semifinals.

items.headline: Pistons Overcome Magic in Series Clincher
items.summary: Detroit rallied to defeat Orlando in a hard-fought Game 7, advancing to the next round of the playoffs.

items.headline: 76ers Eliminate Celtics in East Playoff Battle
items.summary: Philadelphia closed out their series against Boston in a critical Game 7, moving on to the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

items.headline: Allen Dominates Glass in Game 7
items.statContext: Tied playoff career high in points and became the first player since 2020 with 20+ pts, 15+ reb, and 3+ blk in a Game 7.

items.headline: Cunningham, Harris Lead Pistons to Victory
items.statLabel: Cunningham: 32 Pts, 12 Ast | Harris: 30 Pts, 9 Reb
items.statContext: Cunningham and Harris both delivered stellar 30+ point performances to power the Pistons' Game 7 win.

items.headline: Embiid, Maxey Take Over for 76ers
items.statLabel: Embiid: 34 Pts, 12 Reb | Maxey: 30 Pts, 7 Ast
items.statContext: The dynamic duo combined for 64 points to lead Philadelphia past Boston in their Game 7 victory.

items.headline: Banchero's Heroics Not Enough
items.statContext: Banchero delivered a massive scoring effort for the Magic in their Game 7 loss to the Pistons.

items.headline: Avdija's Historic Play-In Performance
items.statContext: The Israeli forward stunned fans with a historic 41-point, 12-assist performance in a Play-In win against the Suns earlier this season. He's currently averaging career highs in points, rebounds, and assists.

items.headline: Eastern Conference Semifinals Kick Off Tonight
items.summary: The Philadelphia 76ers will visit the New York Knicks for Game 1 of their Eastern Conference Semifinals series tonight at 8:00 PM ET.

items.headline: Western Conference Semifinals Begin with Timberwolves vs. Spurs
items.summary: The Minnesota Timberwolves and San Antonio Spurs will clash in Game 1 of their Western Conference Semifinals series tonight at 9:30 PM ET.

items.headline: Cavaliers to Face Pistons in East Semis
items.summary: After their Game 7 victories, the Cleveland Cavaliers and Detroit Pistons are set to face off in the Eastern Conference Semifinals. Game 1 of that series will tip off on Tuesday, May 5th.

items.headline: Thunder and Lakers Set for Western Semifinals Clash
items.summary: The Oklahoma City Thunder will take on the Los Angeles Lakers in the Western Conference Semifinals, with Game 1 scheduled for Tuesday, May 5th.

items.headline: Raptors Offseason Decisions Loom After Playoff Exit
items.summary: Following their Game 7 loss, the Toronto Raptors face significant offseason decisions regarding their roster, including potential trades involving players like Brandon Ingram or Immanuel Quickley.
